en: ever take the other way around, I see the lights and I slow down, it's like they pull
me in, I was gonna drive by, I wasn't gonna stop, then my old truck found a front row
ko: 나는 그냥 지나칠 생각이었어, 멈추지 않을 거라고.

en: spot, gonna drop in, but I wasn't gonna stay, then I heard a bar stool callin' my name,
ko: 들어가긴 할 건데, 오래 있을 생각은 아니었어.

en: wasn't gonna let the bar twist my arm, but I'm helpless and a honky tonk said I wasn't
ko: 바가 내 팔을 비틀게 하진 않을 거야.

en: gonna drink, and then a country song came on, I was almost won, boo, I was almost won,
out of the door when the band kicked in, two, three, four, blame it on E.T.C. for keepin'
that neon burnin' on me, I was gonna drive by, I wasn't gonna stop, then my old truck
ko: 나는 그냥 지나칠 생각이었어, 멈추지 않을 거라고.
